summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Sistema de Inventario MVP. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, CRUD operations, stock management, sales flow, and real-time dashboard updates.

design_issues.issue: Logout functionality not easily discoverable in UI navigation

passed_tests: Dashboard KPI metrics display (productos, ventas hoy, transacciones, stock bajo)
Stock status indicators (green/yellow/red) based on stock vs minimum levels
Products CRUD: Create, Read, Update, Delete operations
Real-time stock status changes (green→red when stock ≤ minimum)
Sales flow: Product selection, cart management, payment methods
Cash payment with change calculation (monto_recibido > total)
Sale completion with stock updates and receipt display
Dashboard real-time updates after sales and product changes
Authentication with JWT cookies and brute force protection
Invalid login rejection with proper error messages
Navigation between Dashboard, Products, and Sales pages
MXN currency formatting in all monetary displays
action_item_for_main_agent: Add visible logout button/menu to improve user experience. Consider adding user menu dropdown in navigation header with logout option.
